name: Chicken Lo Mein
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chicken breast, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook linguine to al dente.
2. Drain thoroughly and place in a bowl.
3. Mix with 1 1/2 tablespoons sesame oil. Cover.
4. Slice chicken into strips.
5. Chop vegetables.
6. Rinse and drain bean sprouts.
7. Combine soy sauce, sherry, and sugar in a small bowl.
8. Heat wok or large skillet until hot.
9. Add 2 tablespoons peanut or sesame oil and heat for about 30 seconds.
10. Stir fry chicken strips until just white and opaque, about 3 to 4 minutes.
11. Add chopped vegetables and keep stirring rapidly for about 45 seconds.
12. Stir in the soy sauce mixture briskly a few times.
13. Remove ginger root and discard.
14. Add cooked noodles and mix well, heating for 1 to 2 minutes until thoroughly mixed and hot.
15. Serve immediately.
